data_boundary.role: free fallback evidence layer; source tracing only; not trading instruction
data_boundary.api_keys: loaded from GitHub Actions Secrets or local .env; never written to output
data_boundary.discipline: If fallback data is empty, rate-limited or unavailable, record data_gap and do not fabricate values.
